Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention.SeoMixin.Builder

Packages that use SeoMixin.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.

  • Uses of SeoMixin.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention that return SeoMixin.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static SeoMixin.Builder
    SeoMixin.create()
    Creates a new builder.
    SeoMixin.Builder
    SeoMixin.Builder.robotsAllow(String userAgent, String... paths)
    Adds an Allow rule to the robots policy.
    SeoMixin.Builder
    SeoMixin.Builder.robotsDisallow(String userAgent, String... paths)
    Adds a Disallow rule to the robots policy.
    SeoMixin.Builder
    SeoMixin.Builder.robotsTxt(String value)
    Sets a fully-formed robots.txt body, overriding any rule-builder calls.
    SeoMixin.Builder
    SeoMixin.Builder.sitemapEntry(String url)
    Adds a sitemap entry with only the loc URL.
    SeoMixin.Builder
    SeoMixin.Builder.sitemapEntry(String url, ZonedDateTime lastmod, String changefreq, Double priority)
    Adds a sitemap entry with optional lastmod, changefreq, and priority components.
